creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your report. Could you provide additional information, including:

- uname -a output
- pkg version -v output (as an attachment)
- /var/run/dmesg output as an attachment
- pciconf -lv output as an attachment

Q: Was this system recently updated to 13.0-BETA3? 
Q: Do you recall the last version that successfully resumed?
